enter(address,address,uint256,address,ui.details: If assetAmount is zero, no assets are transferred in.Callable by MINTER_ROLE.

exit(address,address,uint256,address,uin.details: If assetAmount is zero, no assets are transferred out.Callable by BURNER_ROLE.

enter(address,address,uint256,address,ui.notice: Allows minter to mint shares, in exchange for assets.

exit(address,address,uint256,address,uin.notice: Allows burner to burn shares, in exchange for assets.
